description_long: This object is a stylized stuffed toy modeled after a tiger, featuring a geometric, low-poly design. Its surface is covered in a vibrant orange color with bold, angular black stripes and white accents on the face, underbelly, and paws. The toy stands on all four legs, with a slightly elongated body and a tail that curves gently downward. The facial features are simplified, with triangular shapes forming the eyes, nose, and mouth, giving it a modern, abstract appearance. The texture appears soft and plush, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall build suggests it is lightweight and squeezable. This toy would likely appeal to children or serve as a decorative item in urban parks, playgrounds, or home environments.
description: A geometric, low-poly stuffed tiger toy with orange, black, and white coloring, standing on all fours. Its surface is soft and plush, with bold angular stripes and simplified facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tiger's face with triangular eyes, nose, and mouth, and both front legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated body, angular black stripes, and the curve of the tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back, tail, and symmetrical black stripe patterns running down the spine.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular stripes and body posture.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with simplified triangular eyes and a closed mouth, giving it a calm and abstract appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head facing forward and the tail gently curved downward.
